Terms of Use

Last updated: May 2025

1. Agreement to Terms

By accessing and using the National Secure Storage — Jeffrey's Bay website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

2. Description of Service

National Secure Storage provides self-storage rental services for individuals and businesses. Our services include online unit reservations, secure payment processing, and access to storage facilities at 35 St Croix Street, Jeffrey's Bay, Eastern Cape, 6330.

3. Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years old to use our services. By registering, you represent that you are of legal age and have the authority to enter into a binding agreement.

4. Storage Unit Rental

Rental agreements are month-to-month unless a longer term is selected at booking. Available terms are 1, 3, 6, and 12 months. Pricing is displayed on our website and is subject to change with 30 days' notice.

Units are rented on a first-come, first-served basis. Availability is indicated on our website but is subject to change.

5. Payment Terms

Payments are processed securely online. All prices are in South African Rand (ZAR). Payment must be made in advance for the selected rental term. Late payments may result in loss of access to your unit.

We accept Visa and Mastercard credit cards. Debit cards are not accepted for online payments at this time.

6. Access and Hours

Access to the storage facility is available during the following hours:

  • Monday to Friday: 08:00 – 17:00
  • Saturday: 09:00 – 13:00
  • Sunday and Public Holidays: Closed

Hours may change seasonally. We will provide notice of any changes.

7. Prohibited Items

You may not store the following items in your unit:

  • Perishable goods, food, or living plants
  • Flammable or explosive materials
  • Hazardous chemicals or substances
  • Illegal goods or materials
  • Radioactive materials
  • Asbestos or toxic waste

8. Security and Liability

While our facility is equipped with 24/7 CCTV surveillance and perimeter security, National Secure Storage is not responsible for loss or damage to stored items due to theft, fire, flood, or other events beyond our control. We strongly recommend that you obtain insurance for valuable items.

You are responsible for providing your own padlock for your unit.

9. Cancellation and Termination

You may cancel your rental at any time by providing 30 days' written notice (email acceptable). Refunds are calculated on a pro-rata basis for unused days of the rental period. A R150 cancellation admin fee applies to monthly contracts.

10. Right of Entry

We reserve the right to enter your storage unit in the following circumstances:

  • Emergency situations (fire, flood, gas leak)
  • Maintenance or repairs
  • Compliance with legal requirements
  • Suspected illegal activity (with law enforcement)

11. Intellectual Property

All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and software, is the property of National Secure Storage and is protected by copyright laws.

12. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, National Secure Storage shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services.

13. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

14. Governing Law

These Terms of Use are governed by the laws of the Republic of South Africa. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of South Africa.

15. Contact

For questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us:

National Secure Storage — Jeffrey's Bay
35 St Croix Street, Jeffrey's Bay, Eastern Cape, 6330
Email: info@nss-jbay.co.za
Phone: 063 546 1740 / 061 905 8382

NATIONAL SECURE STORAGE

Secure, affordable self-storage solutions in Jeffrey's Bay. Your space, your peace of mind. 24/7 CCTV, flexible contracts, and drive-up access.
